params.prompt: Use the attached reference photo as the real speaker/founder reference. Create a premium 4:5 PROGRAM GRAPHIC for Limitless Club that feels like a high-end AI masterclass keynote poster. The founder should look human, confident, approachable, wearing a light gray blazer and black shirt like the reference, standing on a dark cinematic stage with subtle blue AI holograms behind him. Text: LIMITLESS CLUB; HERMES AGENT; Multi-Agent AI Masterclass; Build the team that never sleeps.; คอร์สที่จะเปลี่ยน AI ให้เป็น “ทีมงาน” ของคุณ; Chief of Staff Agent; Content Agent; Vibe Coding Agent; สร้างทีม AI Agent ที่ทำงาน 24/7; By Jedi Trinupab · @jeditrinupab. Black graphite silver palette, elegant serif headline, clean sans body, premium not hypey. Large readable title, safe margins, no clutter, no extra logos, no duplicate text.
